svg.title: Hiking monitor enclosure — exploded 3D view v3
svg.desc: Isometric exploded diagram. Top shell front face has landscape e-ink display aperture. Back face has two velcro strap slots and carabiner bail near top. Ribbon cable exits left short edge of display. Bottom shell has LTR-390 aperture on top face, louvered vent insert on long side wall, slide switch on left short-end wall, USB-C on front wall.
svg.text: Isometric · not to scale · front face (display) faces viewer · 70 × 50 mm footprint
Velcro strap wraps chest strap webbing perpendicular through back-face slots
